---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: "feat: <short description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem statement

What problem are you trying to solve? Who is affected and when does it occur?

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you'd like to see and how it would work from a user's perspective.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why they were rejected (or trade-offs).

## Additional context

Mockups, links, related issues, or anything else that helps frame the request.
